StadiumID.description: The unique ID of the stadium

Active.description: Whether or not this stadium is active

Name.description: The full name of the stadium

City.description: The city where the stadium is located

State.description: The state where the stadium is located (only US and Canadian stadiums will have values)

Country.description: The 3-digit country code where the stadium is located

Capacity.description: The estimated seating capacity of the stadium

Surface.description: The playing surface of the stadium (Grass, Artificial or Dome)

LeftField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the left field wall

MidLeftField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the mid left field wall

LeftCenterField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the left center field wall

MidLeftCenterField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the mid left center field wall

CenterField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the center field wall

MidRightCenterField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the mid right center field wall

RightCenterField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the right center field wall

MidRightField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the mid right field wall

RightField.description: The estimated distance between home plate and the right field wall

GeoLat.description: The geographic latitude coordinate of this venue

GeoLong.description: The geographic longitude coordinate of this venue

Altitude.description: The altitude of the stadium in feet

HomePlateDirection.description: The direction that the batter is facing while looking at the pitcher's mound. If the home plate is at the north of the stadium, the batter is facing south, so the value is given as 180 degrees. If home plate is at the east the batter faces west, so it's 270 degrees. If the home plate is at the south the batter faces north, so it's 0 degrees. If the home plate is at the west the batter faces east, so it's 90 degrees.

Type.description: The type of the stadium (possible values: Outdoor, Dome, RetractableDome)
